caption: The video features a man standing at a podium, delivering a speech. He is dressed in traditional attire, wearing a white vest over a beige shirt, and has a white beard and glasses. The background consists of a textured wall with a modern design, featuring geometric patterns and a large, cylindrical structure on the right side that appears to be a decorative or symbolic element. The man speaks into two microphones, suggesting that this is an official or formal event. His posture and expression indicate that he is addressing an audience with confidence and authority. The setting appears to be indoors, possibly in a government or institutional building.
